message:
style(bubbles): use underscore separators in large numeric literals

Improves readability of the test constant 3600500 (1 hour + 500ms in
milliseconds) by formatting it as 3_600_500. This follows Rust's numeric
literal formatting conventions for large numbers.

Affects both stopwatch.rs and timer.rs tests for hour-with-subsecond
precision formatting validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
